# Priyansh Singh Purawat — Full Stack Developer

> Portfolio of Priyansh Singh Purawat, a full-stack developer and BCA student at JECRC University (Jaipur, India) specializing in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and modern full-stack web development. Available for freelance and full-time work.

Priyansh builds responsive, end-to-end web applications using React, Node.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and modern JavaScript tooling. He focuses on clean architecture, accessible UI, and shipping real products from database to deployment.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Hero intro, full-stack overview, MERN expertise, about, selected projects, contact form

## Skills
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, HTML5, CSS3, modern JavaScript (ES2022+)
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, JWT authentication, server-side validation
- Database: MongoDB, Mongoose, PostgreSQL, SQL fundamentals
- DevOps & tooling: Git, GitHub, Vercel, Vite, npm/bun, environment management
- Practices: responsive mobile-first design, accessibility (WCAG), SEO, performance optimization, component-driven UI

## Projects
- Full Stack E-Commerce — React + Node/Express + MongoDB + JWT auth + payment integration. In progress. https://github.com/priyanshsinghpurawat
- Aspect Ratio Calculator — Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS utility for screen resolution and aspect ratio conversion. https://github.com/priyanshsinghpurawat
- Notes Taking App — Vanilla JS notes app with localStorage persistence (create, save, delete). https://priyanshsinghpurawat.github.io/Notes-APP/
- Exchange Rate App — Real-time currency converter using live exchange-rate API. https://priyanshsinghpurawat.github.io/Exchange-Rate/

## Education
- Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) — JECRC University, Jaipur, India (current)

## Focus areas
- Full-stack web development (frontend, backend, database, DevOps)
- MERN stack: MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js
- TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, modern React (hooks, suspense, server components)
- REST APIs, authentication, deployment on Vercel and similar platforms
